title: Devaronian blood-poisoning
content:

'''Devaronian blood-poisoning''' was an affliction, caused by contact with the [[Devaronian blood-poison]] gemstone, that would cause great pain to the victim once the absorbed particles reached the [[Blood/Legends|bloodstream]]. Once it reached the bloodstream, it released [[Poison/Legends|poison]].

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]''
